title: Stay up to date with the monday apps and API!

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Exciting news!

We have added more ways to keep up with the latest on our apps framework and API.

You can access a summary of our upcoming Planned Changes here:

monday API docs

Planned Changes

Learn about scheduled changes and upcoming deprecations planned for the monday.com GraphQL API. For a full list of updates, see our API changelog.

There, you will also find a summary of recent, major changes across our platform.

Additionally, we will continue to post all of our changes in our changelogs.

API changes will be listed in the API Changelog.

Apps framework changes will be listed in the Framework Changelog.

Happy building!

posts.cookedHtml: The Planned Changes link is broken again. Can you update the link again please?

posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @morgantouchagency,

Welcome to the community!

We no longer have the planned changes page. However, you can follow our API and apps framework changelogs to see upcoming changes

Best,
Rachel
